rationale: The citing paper explicitly positions itself as extending prior marketing M&A work that focused on firm-level/long-term outcomes, while the cited paper is a core example of that stream (firm-specific driver of acquisition performance via selection/deployment and long-term abnormal returns). Given this direct topical and conceptual alignment, and an exact DOI match (10.1509/jmkr.44.1.057), this is plausibly a foundational/theory-source citation rather than an incidental mention.
